Diagnostics Interval Tooltip: How often all sensor values are polled (Battery, MultiPlus, Grid, PV, Solar...). Min: 10s.
Overall Stats Interval Tooltip: How often energy totals (today/week/month/year) are updated. Recommendation: 300s.
Rate Limit Info: Rate limit: max. ~3 requests/second. At default settings (30s interval) well within limits.
Sensor Count Info: Sensors: Battery (34) · MultiPlus (12) · Grid (10) · PV Inverter (17) · Tank (6) · Solar Charger (7) · System (5) · Overall Stats (20) = 111 data points
